dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system failed to execute any governance-related logic because the prompt definition for 'architecture-work-assessment' was missing across all 29 reasoning spans.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: No causal reasoning was performed. Every attempt to initiate the reasoning step resulted in a 'Missing prompt definition' error, preventing any architectural analysis.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The agent was unable to surface or resolve trade-offs as the orchestration flow was blocked by a configuration error.
